endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Subscriptions.Admin/directoryTenants
endpoints.description: Lists all the directory tenants under the current subscription and given resource group name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Subscriptions.Admin/directoryTenants/{tenant}
endpoints.description: Get a directory tenant by name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{TENANT}} with a real tenant.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Subscriptions.Admin/directoryTenants/{tenant}
endpoints.description: Create or updates a directory tenant.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{TENANT}} with a real tenant.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Subscriptions.Admin/directoryTenants/{tenant}
endpoints.description: Delete a directory tenant under a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{TENANT}} with a real tenant.
